payload.answer: In admin SQL select-only mode, read-only SELECT queries such as `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10` are allowed, while mutating statements such as `DELETE FROM memory_cards` are denied. No memory should be created, modified, or deleted from this input.
citations: Input: Admin SQL select-only mode: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a debug/admin capability fixture, not a durable user preference or personal fact.

details: Recognized this as a debug permission explanation request.
Did not create any durable memory cards.
Preserved the stated permission boundary: SELECT allowed, DELETE denied.
